evals.prompt: Create a new Rancher UI extension called 'monitoring-extras' that adds a top-level product with a dashboard page showing cluster metrics summary.
evals.expected_output: A scaffolded extension with index.ts, product.ts, routing/extension-routing.ts, and a dashboard page component. Product uses inStore: 'management'. All files are TypeScript. Routing follows /<PRODUCT>/c/:cluster pattern.
expectations: index.ts calls importTypes(plugin) and plugin.addProduct(require('./product'))
index.ts calls plugin.addRoutes() with routes from routing/extension-routing.ts
product.ts exports init() function using $extension.DSL(store, name) with product() call
product.ts uses inStore: 'management' for top-level product
routing/extension-routing.ts defines routes with meta containing product and cluster params
Route names follow the pattern 'product-c-cluster-*'
Dashboard page component uses <script setup lang="ts"> (Composition API)
No raw HTML <input> or <select> elements in any component
All .vue files have <style lang="scss" scoped>

evals.prompt: Add a custom tab to the Deployment detail page in Rancher that shows pod restart statistics. The tab should appear in Cluster Explorer for all clusters.
evals.expected_output: A plugin.addTab() call in index.ts with TabLocation.RESOURCE_DETAIL_PAGE, a LocationConfig targeting apps.deployment in the explorer product, and a Vue component for the tab content.
expectations: Uses plugin.addTab() with TabLocation.RESOURCE_DETAIL_PAGE as the 'where' parameter
LocationConfig includes product: ['explorer'] and resource: ['apps.deployment']
Tab component uses <script setup lang="ts"> (Composition API, not Options API)
Tab component receives the resource as a prop
No custom save logic or API calls in the tab component (read-only display)
Does NOT use raw HTML <table> — uses Rancher components for layout

evals.prompt: Create an edit page for a custom CRD 'myapp.example.com' in my extension. The form should have fields for name, namespace, replicas (number), and image (text). Support create and edit modes.
evals.expected_output: An edit/myapp.example.com.vue file using CruResource wrapper and CreateEditView mixin. Form uses Rancher components (LabeledInput, NameNsDescription). Save goes through the standard CreateEditView.save() flow.
expectations: File is located at edit/myapp.example.com.vue (file name matches resource name)
Uses CruResource as the form wrapper component
Uses CreateEditView mixin (mixins: [CreateEditView])
Uses Options API with <script lang="ts"> (because of CreateEditView mixin)
CruResource has :resource, :mode, :errors props and @finish="save" event
Uses NameNsDescription component for name and namespace fields
Uses LabeledInput from @components/Form/LabeledInput/LabeledInput.vue for replicas and image fields
Does NOT implement a custom save button — relies on CruResource footer
Does NOT make direct API calls — save flow goes through CreateEditView.save() → SteveModel.save()
Does NOT use raw HTML <input>, <select>, or <textarea>
LabeledInput uses v-model binding to value.spec properties
Has :mode prop passed to all form components for view/edit state
